description: Shared schemas compile with no TypeScript errors
Shared package builds successfully to dist/
steps: Run cd shared && npm run build

description: Shared package exports all required schemas
steps: Verify all schema exports are present

description: CDK stack synthesizes successfully
steps: Run cd infrastructure && npx cdk synth

description: CDK tests pass (15 assertions)
DynamoDB table has correct key schema in template
steps: CDK test: hasResourceProperties AWS::DynamoDB::Table with PK/SK

description: DynamoDB table has GSI1 and GSI2 defined
steps: CDK test: hasResourceProperties with GSI1 and GSI2

description: Lambda function configured with Node.js 20 runtime
steps: CDK test: Lambda runtime is nodejs20.x, memory 256MB, timeout 30s

description: API Gateway HTTP API has CORS configured
Stack exports ApiUrl, FrontendBucketName, CloudFrontUrl, TableName outputs
steps: CDK test: hasOutput for each required output

description: Local API server starts and returns seed data
GET /announcements returns all announcements
GET /announcements?service=Lambda filters correctly
GET /announcements?search=bedrock searches correctly
POST /announcements creates a new announcement
PUT /announcements/:id updates an announcement
DELETE /announcements/:id removes an announcement
GET /services returns unique service list
GET /announcements/:id returns single announcement
Homepage displays announcement feed with all 15 items
Homepage shows service filter sidebar on desktop
steps: Verify filter sidebar with service list

description: Service filter filters announcements by service
steps: Verify URL updated with service param

description: Announcement card links to detail page
Detail page shows full announcement with breadcrumbs
Admin page shows table of all announcements
Admin Add New button opens creation form
steps: Verify form modal opens with empty fields

description: Admin create form validates required fields
Admin can create a new announcement
Admin edit button opens pre-filled form
steps: Verify form pre-filled with existing data

description: Admin delete button shows confirmation dialog
Navigation between Feed and Admin works
URL reflects service filter state
Frontend builds successfully for production
Homepage has proper AWS-inspired color scheme
steps: Verify dark navy header, orange accents, light background

description: Homepage uses Space Grotesk for headings and DM Sans for body
Announcement cards have proper hover effects
steps: Verify shadow and border color change

description: Service badges have correct colors per service
steps: Check badge colors match SERVICE_COLORS constant

description: Admin table is properly styled with zebra striping effect
Loading skeleton animations are smooth
steps: Navigate to page with slow connection

description: Responsive design works at 375px mobile width
steps: Verify single column layout, no overflow

description: Modal forms are properly styled with backdrop
Page transitions and staggered animations work
steps: Verify cards animate in with staggered delay

description: Header search input has proper focus styling
Empty state has appropriate illustration/icon
steps: Verify empty state with icon and message

description: Detail page has clean layout with breadcrumb navigation
Toast notifications animate in from the right
Search from header works on homepage
Admin can delete an announcement and it disappears from table
Admin can update an announcement
Mobile filter button shows on small screens
steps: Verify Filter button visible, sidebar hidden
